mapper.select: SELECT user_id, today_plunder_count, today_purchased_count, last_plunder_date FROM plunder_data WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plunder_data (user_id, today_plunder_count, today_purchased_count, last_plunder_date, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{todayCount}, #{todayPurchased}, #{lastResetDate}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE today_plunder_count = #{todayCount}, today_purchased_count = #{todayPurchased}, last_plunder_date = #{lastResetDate}, update_time = #{updateTime}
mapper.select: SELECT od_user_id AS userId, level, silver, wood, paper, food, `rank` FROM user_resource WHERE od_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%\_', #{serverSuffix})
